import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns

def task_func(list_of_menuitems):
    # Flatten the list of menu items
    flattened_items = [item for sublist in list_of_menuitems for item in sublist]

    # Count the frequency of each menu item
    menu_counts = Counter(flattened_items)

    # Create a DataFrame from the counts
    df = pd.DataFrame(list(menu_counts.items()), columns=['Menu Items', 'Frequency'])

    # Set up the plot using seaborn
    plt.rcParams["figure.figsize"] = (10, 6)
    ax = sns.barplot(x='Menu Items', y='Frequency', data=df)

    return ax, list(flattened_items)
